name: Sue Scheff's Pastry Twists
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle dough with hazelnuts and sugar. (Amounts are up to you. The sweeter and nuttier you want it, the more you should add.)
2. Fold and roll the dough.
3. Repeat sprinkling with the nut-sugar mixture and folding three times.
4. Cut into strips about 1/4 inch wide and 5 inches long.
5. Twist each strip twice.
6. Bake at 350°F until golden brown, about 10 minutes.
7. When cool, paint one side with melted semi-sweet or sweet chocolate.
